Act_Name: The Hindu Married Women's Right to Separate Residence and Maintenance Act, 1946
Content:
(1) This Act may be called the Hindu Married Women's Right to Separate
Residence and Maintenance Act, 1946.
 (2) It extends to the whole of [Bangladesh].1
Amendment_Notes: The word “Bangladesh” was substituted for the word “Pakistan” by section 3 and the Second Schedule of the Bangladesh Laws (Revision And Declaration) Act, 1973 (Act No. VIII of 1973)

Act_Name: The Hindu Married Women's Right to Separate Residence and Maintenance Act, 1946
Section_Title: Grounds for claiming separate residence and maintenance

Act_Name: The Hindu Married Women's Right to Separate Residence and Maintenance Act, 1946
Content:
When allowing a claim for separate residence and maintenance under
section 2, the Court shall determine the amount to be paid by the husband to
the wife therefore, and in so doing shall have regard to the social standing of
the parties and the extent of the husband's means.
